title: Botania++
description: Feel the edge of nature in your Minecraft world
body:
# Botania++ 🌺🍃 Botania++ is a modpack enriched with diverse features and compensating elements based on the key mod - Botania 🌼. This pack brings a touch of nature 🌿 into your regular Minecraft world. ## Key Features 🕹️ [**Botania**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) is a mod that adds the magic of nature into the game. Besides adding twist in the gameplay mechanics, it also contributes a number of woodland-themed items and blocks to create a magical ambient environment. **Thanks to Botania++, all of this becomes even more exciting and colorful** 🎨 ## List of Mods 📜 List of mods for the latest **release** version: **Soon** List of mods for the latest **beta** version: [**Link**](https://moddermore.net/list/GvBfoY4JDYe9) ## Resource Packs Support 🎮 Botania++ supports **Optifine** resource packs, allowing you to customize the look and feel of your game to your liking. Recommended resource packs: 1. [**Overgrown Flowery GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/overgrown-flowery-gui) - Introduces a more lively and green interface, filled with foliage, making it perfect for the themes of Botania 🍀 2. [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) - Has rebranded images of agricultural crops, which help to enhance the visual aspects of the farm 🌽🍓 ## Getting Started ⚔️ To start playing, use the [Modrinth launcher](https://modrinth.com/app) or other multi launcher analogues - [MultiMC](https://multimc.org/), [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/) or [PrismLauncer](https://prismlauncher.org/). ## Support 🆘 ![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-singular_vector.svg) To get support, contact me at Discord - **gideonwhite1029** for help ## Donation 🎁 ## Other projects 🛠️
# Welcome the magic and nature into your Minecraft world with Botania++ 🎇🍃
